speaker: Customer
en: Good afternoon.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Good afternoon.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Atlanta Travel Agency, may I help you?

speaker: Customer
en: I saw your advert in the newspaper this morning and decided to come over for more detailed information about some trips that you currently offer.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: What kind of trips do you have in mind?

speaker: Customer
en: Well, I enjoy surfing very much and want to get tanned, but all my friends suggest either mountain climbing or biking.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: We currently offer all the three types.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Even though biking is the most popular type of holiday, it doesn't work for everyone.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: I think you should follow your heart.

speaker: Customer
en: Right.

speaker: Customer
en: What are my options for accommodation then?

speaker: Travel Agent
en: For this type of holiday, you can choose to stay in a hotel or a self-catering apartment.

speaker: Customer
en: Can you introduce the hotel package first?

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Sure.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: The price for our hotel package is quite reasonable compared with that of your own reservation.

speaker: Customer
en: What does the price include?

speaker: Travel Agent
en: It covers the beachside hotel and free breakfast.

speaker: Customer
en: Good.

speaker: Customer
en: Does the hotel have any recreational facilities?

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Oh, rest assured.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: The hotel is fully equipped with a pool, a nightclub and a gym.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Guests can enjoy a vibrant nightlife during their stay at the hotel.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Five-star ratings are common for the hotel's satisfying service.

speaker: Customer
en: So how much does it cost?

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Well, it was originally 360 euros for an adult, but we are now offering a Labour Day promotion.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: You can get a discount of 12.5%.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: So that's ... 315 euros for now, a really good deal.

speaker: Customer
en: Right.

speaker: Customer
en: What about the self-catering apartment?

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Oh, that'll be even cheaper.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: But you have to stay in a shared room with other guests.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Each room has 6 bunk beds with lockers.

speaker: Customer
en: OK ... I think the hotel is much better.

speaker: Customer
en: Getting a good night's sleep is critical for a relaxing holiday.

speaker: Customer
en: I can't stand sharing a room with someone who snores all night long.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Can't agree more.

speaker: Customer
en: What about the surfing equipment rental?

speaker: Customer
en: I don't want to bring my own surfboard.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: You can hire a surfboard by the hour, day or week.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Just book it in advance, and it will be delivered to the hotel or even directly to the beach.

speaker: Customer
en: How much does it cost?

speaker: Travel Agent
en: It costs 15 euros for a day.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: But for a week's rental, it's just 75 euros.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: The surf station also provides surf lessons if you're interested.

speaker: Customer
en: That's good to know.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Oh, there's one more thing you should know.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Just in case of an accident during your trip, we recommend each customer to have the correct travel cover in place before leaving home.

speaker: Customer
en: Please tell me about it.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Well, we mainly offer two types of insurance.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: The first one is basic coverage.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: It costs 30 euros.

speaker: Customer
en: What does it include?

speaker: Travel Agent
en: It covers medical treatment during your trip and things like missing your flight, flight delays and cancellations.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: But you know extreme sports can be quite dangerous, and therefore injuries during these activities are excluded.

speaker: Customer
en: Then, how about the other one?

speaker: Travel Agent
en: The second one is called premier cover.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: It is more expensive at 42.50 euros.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: But we highly recommend this one for regular surfers.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: If you receive an injury or hurt anyone else while participating in extreme sports like surfing, you are fully covered.

speaker: Customer
en: I see.

speaker: Customer
en: I think I'll go with the premier cover.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: When your flight gets in, there will be a minivan to pick you up at the airport and take you to the hotel.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: But you'll have to get to London airport yourself.

speaker: Customer
en: It's alright.

speaker: Customer
en: I'll just take the airport shuttle.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Actually, I personally suggest you take a taxi.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: It is much cheaper than other types of transport, including the airport shuttle.

speaker: Customer
en: Thanks for the tip.

speaker: Customer
en: I think I'll book a trip for next weekend.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: OK, how would you like to pay?

speaker: Customer
en: Do you accept credit cards?

speaker: Travel Agent
en: Yes, we do.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: But there will be a slight charge on that.

speaker: Travel Agent
en: If you pay by cheque, there is no extra fee.

speaker: Customer
en: Great.

speaker: Customer
en: I'll write you a cheque then ...
